name: Large Outbound Transfer Slow Rate of Transfer
notes: Detects a single host that is sending more data out of the network than received.  This rule detects over 500 MB of data transferred over a 2 hour period.  This is fairly slow and could indicated stealthy data leakage.
conditions_text: when the source bytes is greater than 52428800
when the flow context is Local to Remote
when the flow bias is any of the following mostly outbound
when at least 100 flows are seen with the same Source IP, Destination Port, Destination IP in 120 minutes
thresholds: when at least 100 flows are seen with the same Source IP, Destination Port, Destination IP in 120 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Large Outbound Transfer Slow Rate of Transfer on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the source bytes is greater than 52428800
AND when the flow context is Local to Remote
AND when the flow bias is any of the following mostly outbound
AND when at least 100 flows are seen with the same Source IP, Destination Port, Destination IP in 120 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Large Outbound Transfer Slow Rate of Transfer

Event description: Detects a single host that is sending more data out of the network than received.  This rule detects over 500 MB of data transferred over a 2 hour period.  This is fairly slow and could indicated stealthy data leakage.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
